components.materialMaterials: Diamonds worth 300 gp, which the spell consumes.

lore.shortDescription: Return a creature that died in the last minute to life with 1 hit point.
lore.fullText: You touch a creature that has died within the last minute. That creature returns to life with 1 hit point. This spell can't return to life a creature that has died of old age, nor can it restore any missing body parts.
